name: White Bread (Usa Rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1-3/4 cups flour, xanthan gum, salt, and yeast in a large bowl.
2. Heat cottage cheese, water, oil, and honey in a small saucepan or microwave (using a 2-cup glass measure) on HIGH for 2 minutes, until very warm (120 to 130 degrees F).
3. Pour the heated mixture into the flour mixture; add egg. Stir until well blended.
4. Stir in the remaining 1/4 cup flour; knead dough in the bowl until smooth and all flour is incorporated (the dough will be somewhat sticky). Cover the bowl; let rest for 10 minutes.
5. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a lightly greased loaf pan. Cover; let rise in a warm place for 30 minutes.
6. Bake in a 400 degree F oven for 30 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from the pan; cool on a wire rack.
Each slice provides:  113 calories  3 g. protein  3 g. fat  19 g. carbohydrate  0 g dietary fiber  19 mg cholesterol  114 mg sodium
Variation: Nut 'N Honey Bread - Stir in 1/2 cup chopped pecans and 1 tablespoon sesame seeds to dough with the last addition of flour.
